chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-309 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 22-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Even compliance of office objections has not been made by the petitioners, which reflects that the petitioners and their counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
